900 TUB_TRNSFR_ADMSN_CD TUB_TRNSFR_ADMSN_CD GG0170FF1 Tub/Showr Transfer (Start of Stay Perf) CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the resident's performance for tub/shower transfer at the start of the stay (admission). 06=Independent
